# Buildwise Media

> You run the business. Ascend makes you the most-chosen name in your market within 12 months.

## About

Buildwise Media democratizes AI capabilities for American small business owners by installing Ascend in their business. Ascend is a run-for-you AI marketing system for service-business owners who need qualified leads, review velocity, local search strength, and AI search presence working as one operating layer. The Buildwise team and our AI system handle the marketing system so the owner can keep running the business.

## Services

- Pilot: A focused first install for owners who need the audit, core lead path, and first operating layer put in place before a broader rollout.
- Ascend: The primary run-for-you system. It connects the audit, lead generation, follow-up, review velocity, local search, and AI search presence into one managed operating layer.
- Ascend Pro: The advanced tier for businesses that need deeper market coverage, more reporting depth, and a broader operating cadence across locations, service lines, or capacity constraints.

## Contact

Book a fit assessment at https://buildwisemedia.com/book
